title: MA.AMA
overview: Philip, 85, has been living in hope, over the last 30 years, that one day he will be reunited with his wife in afterlife. But his yearning is jeopardised by the dream he had about her—in which he searched for her among the crowd of women in a barren landscape, but he could not recognise her face.
